data.title: Why Is US Pharma Giant Bristol Myers Squibb Stock Trading Lower On Tuesday?
data.description: Bristol Myers' Camzyos missed goals in a Phase 3 nHCM trial, showing no significant benefits over placebo but raised no new safety concerns.

data.title: Skye Bioscience's Obesity Candidate Shows 30% Weight Loss When Combined With Eli Lilly's Blockbuster Drug In Animal Models
data.description: Skye shares surge after new data shows nimacimab reduces weight over 30% with tirzepatide, with stable potency and promising obesity treatment potential.

data.title: What's Going On With Lucid Group Stock On Tuesday?
data.description: Lucid unveils 2026 Gravity SUV with advanced features, while addressing tariff impacts by shifting key production to the U.S.

data.title: Nvidia Brings Powerful RTX 5060 Graphics Cards To Gamers And Creators At Budget Prices
data.description: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ: NVDA) has unveiled the GeForce RTX 5060 GPU series, starting at $299, delivering AI-powered DLSS 4 features and Blackwell architecture. These graphics cards enable ultra-smooth, ray-traced gameplay in titles like Cyberpunk 2077 and Hogwarts Legacy, exceeding 100 FPS at max settings.

data.title: Sam Altman's OpenAI Explores Creating Social Media Competitor To Elon Musk's X
data.description: OpenAI and X feud over social media dominance as Altman and Musk's disagreements continue. X remains popular despite competition.
